1. Bronze Rewards Card - COMPLETE (10/20/2025) - bonus should have been paid
2. Gold Rewards Card - COMPLETE (10/22/2025) - bonus should have been paid
3. Silver Rewards Card - IN_PROGRESS (11/05/2025) - still in progress, so no bonus yet
4. Platinum Rewards Card - REJECTED (10/25/2025) - rejected, so no bonus

So the user has:

This explains why they only received bonuses for two of them. The Silver one is still in progress, and the Platinum one was rejected. I should explain this to the user.

worker_attempts.visible_answer:
Thank you for verifying your identity, Wei! I've looked into your referral history, and I can see what happened. Here's the breakdown of your four referrals:

| Referral | Card Type | Status | Date |
|----------|-----------|--------|------|
| 1 | Bronze Rewards Card | **COMPLETE** | 10/20/2025 |
| 2 | Gold Rewards Card | **COMPLETE** | 10/22/2025 |
| 3 | Silver Rewards Card | **IN PROGRESS** | 11/05/2025 |
| 4 | Platinum Rewards Card | **REJECTED** | 10/25/2025 |

So here's what happened:
- **2 referrals completed successfully** — these are the bonuses you received.
- **1 referral is still in progress** — the Silver Rewards Card referral from November 5th hasn't finished processing yet, so the bonus hasn't been paid out.
- **1 referral was rejected** — the Platinum Rewards Card referral from October 25th was not approved, so no bonus was issued for that one.

Would you like me to look into why the Platinum Rewards Card referral was rejected, or is there anything else I can help you with?
